creator: mzs_47@yahoo.co.in
text:
(In reply to Mark Felder from comment #3)

@Mark,

Is this reported to Elastic/Upstream kibana?

I am trying to host ELK on FreeBSD and I am hitting bunch of issues, including this one.


On a side note, I would also suggest that maybe we start moving with Amazon OpenDistro. From the looks and reads of it, it seems to have better features than stock ELK.

https://opendistro.github.io/for-elasticsearch/
